mapper.insert: insert into t_video(user_id, url, thumbnail, title, type, duration, area, description, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{url}, #{thumbnail}, #{title}, #{type}, #{duration}, #{area}, #{description}, now());

insert into t_video_tag(video_id, tag_id, create_time) values
(#{videoTag.videoId},#{videoTag.tagId},now())
mapper.select:
select count(1) from t_video where 1 = 1
and area = #{area}
